docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYD, OMAR A. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,620.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT BOYD, OMAR A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-19-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOYD, OMAR A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.
REMOVED FROM EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF MARCH 1, 2010.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYD, OMAR A. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,670.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2009 BY RICHARD B. ULMER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
